workflow_steps.description: Retrieve the list of books from the external API and update the database.
workflow_steps.success_criteria: Books must be fetched successfully with at least 1 new entry.

workflow_steps.description: Retrieve the list of authors associated with the books from the external API.
workflow_steps.success_criteria: Authors must be fetched successfully, with each author linked to the correct book.

workflow_steps.description: Retrieve the list of users from the external API and update the user database.
workflow_steps.success_criteria: Users must be fetched successfully, with unique user entries.

workflow_steps.description: Retrieve user activities from the external API for monitoring purposes.
workflow_steps.success_criteria: Activities must be retrieved, allowing tracking of user interactions.
